summary: Decompiled and typed several Classic Mode game-mode routines in src/melee/gm/gmclassic.c, added local Classic matchup/data structs, tightened related gm types and prototypes, removed stale public declarations for now-static helpers, and received an automated report showing 3 new matches plus partial improvements in additional gmclassic functions.

key_files.role: Primary decomp work: added Classic Mode local data structs, decompiled gmClassic_801B2BA4, gmClassic_801B2D54, gmClassic_OnLoad, gmClassic_801B3500, gmClassic_801B3A34, and gmClassic_801B3B40, and adjusted gmClassic_801B3E44 to use typed gmClassic_803DDEC8.x00.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gm/gmclassic.c +634/-8
raw_diff: gmclassic.c adds gmClassicMatchup, gmClassicIntroData, gmClassic_80490880Data, gmClassic_803DDEC8Data and STATIC_ASSERTs
raw_diff: replaces /// placeholders for gmClassic_801B2BA4, gmClassic_801B2D54, gmClassic_OnLoad, gmClassic_801B3500, gmClassic_801B3A34, gmClassic_801B3B40
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists gmClassic_801B3B40 and gmClassic_801B3A34 as 100% matched, and other gmclassic routines as improved

key_files.role: Header/type recovery for game-mode data: function pointer fields replaced UNK_T/u32 placeholders and gm_803DDEC8Struct was reshaped with concrete fields and a gmClassicMatchup pointer.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gm/types.h +26/-26
raw_diff: UnkAdventureData x5C/x60/x6C/x70 changed from UNK_T to function pointers
raw_diff: UnkAllstarData x48 through x70 changed from UNK_T/u32 placeholders to function pointers
raw_diff: gm_803DDEC8Struct changed from bitfields/void* to concrete x1/x2/x4/x6/x8 fields and struct gmClassicMatchup* xC

key_files.role: Prototype formatting/signature surface used by gmclassic work; long gm_8017DB88 and fn_8017DD7C declarations were split across lines without apparent semantic signature change.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gm/gmregclear.h +6/-2
raw_diff: gm_8017DB88 prototype reformatted over multiple lines
raw_diff: fn_8017DD7C prototype reformatted over multiple lines

key_files.role: Public header cleanup: removed stale declarations for helpers that became static/internal and removed a global gmClassic_803DDEC8 declaration from this header.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gm/gmclassic.h +0/-4
raw_diff: removes UNK_RET gmClassic_801B2BA4 and gmClassic_801B2D54 declarations
raw_diff: removes gm_803DDEC8Struct gmClassic_803DDEC8 declaration

key_files.role: Small related cleanup: changed a null function/data callback assignment from integer 0 to NULL.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gm/gmallstar.c +1/-1
raw_diff: data->x58 = 0 changed to data->x58 = NULL in gm_801B60A4_OnLoad

what_changed.text: Added typed local Classic Mode structures for matchup entries, matchup data, intro data, gmClassic_80490880, and gmClassic_803DDEC8, each guarded with STATIC_ASSERT sizes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c typedefs gmClassicMatchup, gmClassicMatchupData, gmClassicIntroData, gmClassic_80490880Data, gmClassic_803DDEC8Data

what_changed.text: Implemented Classic matchup ordering and selection logic using a sentinel stage value 0x148, HSD_Randi shuffle order arrays, current player character filtering, prior matchup checks, and stage comparison via Stage_8022519C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_InitMatchupOrder loops until matchups[count].x00 != 0x148 and shuffles order with HSD_Randi
raw_diff: gmClassic_801B2BA4 checks gm_80164430, gm_80164840, target_char, existing temp->xC entries, and Stage_8022519C

what_changed.text: Implemented gmClassic_OnLoad initialization: clears xC pointers in gmClassic_803DDEC8.x00, initializes four matchup order arrays, resets gm_804908A0 through nested loops, assigns callback fields, and enters minor scene 0x70.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_OnLoad body

what_changed.text: Implemented gmClassic_801B3500 setup for intro/preload/audio data, including enemy and ally arrays, color setup, game cache entries, stage selection, and audio bit accumulation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3500 body
text_corpus: bot report shows gmClassic_801B3500 improved from 0.00% to 92.27%

what_changed.text: Implemented gmClassic_801B3A34 and gmClassic_801B3B40, both reported by the decomp bot as new 100% matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3A34 body includes PAD_STACK(8), stage selection, gm_8017CE34, gm_8016F088
raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3B40 body includes PAD_STACK(4), match exit status updates, target-test record updates
text_corpus: bot report lists gmClassic_801B3A34 +268 0.00% to 100.00% and gmClassic_801B3B40 +516 0.00% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Typed several game-mode callback fields in UnkAdventureData and UnkAllstarData as concrete function pointers and updated gm_803DDEC8Struct from bitfields/void* to concrete scalar fields plus gmClassicMatchup* xC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h UnkAdventureData and UnkAllstarData callback field changes
raw_diff: types.h gm_803DDEC8Struct changes

what_changed.text: The automated report recorded overall matched code +784 bytes and matched data +24 bytes, with .sdata for main/melee/gm/gmclassic reported as a new 100% match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

smart_moves.text: Recovered data layout before implementing logic: the PR defines small local structs and typed globals for gmClassic_80490880 and gmClassic_803DDEC8, allowing later code to use field access such as x00, x0CC, x1B8, x26C, x2B0, x74, and x80 instead of treating the data as an opaque blob.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c local typedefs and extern gmClassic_80490880Data/gmClassic_803DDEC8Data
raw_diff: gmClassic_OnLoad and gmClassic_801B2D54 use typed fields

smart_moves.text: Kept helper scope narrow: gmClassic_801B2BA4 and gmClassic_801B2D54 were removed from the public header and implemented as static/internal code in gmclassic.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.h removes declarations for gmClassic_801B2BA4 and gmClassic_801B2D54
raw_diff: gmclassic.c implements static gmClassic_801B2BA4 and static gmClassic_801B2D54

smart_moves.text: Used typed function-pointer fields for callback tables rather than leaving UNK_T/u32 placeholders, making assignments and calls in Classic/All-Star load paths clearer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h UnkAllstarData x48-x70 function pointer fields
raw_diff: gmClassic_OnLoad assigns gm_8017EB3C, gm_8017EB64, gm_8017EBCC, gm_8017EB98, gm_8017ECA0, gm_8017ED08, gm_8017ECD4, gm_8017EC00, gm_8017EC50

decomp_lessons.lesson: For game-mode data-heavy routines, recovering the local table layout can unlock cleaner field-based decompilation of multiple functions in the same TU.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c adds typed gmClassic_803DDEC8Data/gmClassic_80490880Data and then uses those fields throughout new implementations
text_corpus: bot report shows two new function matches and four additional gmclassic improvements

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered helper is only used inside one C file, making it static and removing stale public UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations improves header truthfulness.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.h removes public gmClassic_801B2BA4/gmClassic_801B2D54 declarations
raw_diff: gmclassic.c implements these as static helpers

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use NULL for null callback/function-pointer fields after the relevant struct fields are typed as pointers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmallstar.c data->x58 = 0 changed to NULL
raw_diff: types.h UnkAllstarData x58 typed as u8 (*)(u8, u8, u8)

naming_conventions.convention: New local Classic Mode types use the gmClassic prefix and descriptive table roles while preserving offset-style field names where semantics remain unclear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c typedef names and offset field names

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered local variables mix role names where clear with temp/address-style names where meaning remains uncertain.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_InitMatchupOrder, gmClassic_801B2BA4, gmClassic_801B3500, gmClassic_801B3A34

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced local typed overlays for existing data symbols and used STATIC_ASSERTs to lock expected structure sizes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c typedefs with STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(...))
raw_diff: extern gmClassic_80490880Data gmClassic_80490880 and extern gmClassic_803DDEC8Data gmClassic_803DDEC8
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Evidence shows typed overlays were part of the PR; it does not independently prove each field name or semantic meaning.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used natural loops for sentinel scans, order initialization, shuffle passes, callback-table clearing, enemy/ally processing, and audio accumulation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_InitMatchupOrder for loops over count
raw_diff: gmClassic_OnLoad for loop clearing entry->xC and nested loops zeroing gm_804908A0
raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3500 loops over enemy/ally arrays and audio accumulation
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This aligns with loaded natural-loop standards, though the PR evidence only shows the resulting source shape.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in two matched functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3A34 contains PAD_STACK(8)
raw_diff: gmClassic_801B3B40 contains PAD_STACK(4)
text_corpus: bot report says both functions reached 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports the functions as matches, but the PR slice does not isolate PAD_STACK as necessary or sufficient.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Kept some generated-looking control-flow artifacts such as gotos and infinite loops in partially matched helper logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmClassic_801B2BA4 uses goto next
raw_diff: gmClassic_801B2D54 uses for (;;) on missing result cases
text_corpus: bot report shows gmClassic_801B2BA4 at 93.87% and gmClassic_801B2D54 at 99.96%, not fully matched
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Because these helpers were not reported as 100%, avoid treating the exact control-flow shape as a general accepted pattern.

notes: Strong evidence for files changed, code shapes, type/header edits, and automated match report.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and author rationale are not evidenced.
The loaded raw diff was truncated in the prompt, but targeted local lookup supplied the missing gmregclear.h and types.h hunks.
Automated report gives function-level match outcomes for some functions, but no narrow build log, objdiff details, or evidence isolating individual tactics such as PAD_STACK.
Several newly introduced field names remain offset-style; do not infer semantic meanings beyond the names present in the diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover local table layouts before decompiling data-driven gm routines
accepted_candidate_records.text: In gmclassic, adding local typed overlays for gmClassic_80490880 and gmClassic_803DDEC8 with STATIC_ASSERTs preceded field-based implementations of multiple Classic Mode routines and coincided with bot-reported matches/improvements.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c local data typedefs and field-based uses
text_corpus: bot report 3 new matches and 4 improvements

accepted_candidate_records.title: Static recovered helpers should not remain in public headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR removed public UNK_RET declarations for gmClassic_801B2BA4 and gmClassic_801B2D54 after implementing them as static helpers in gmclassic.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.h removes helper declarations
raw_diff: gmclassic.c static helper definitions

source_update_candidates.title: gmclassic.c owns Classic Mode local data overlays and matchup selection routines
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2426 indicates src/melee/gm/gmclassic.c contains Classic Mode local structs for matchup and intro data plus helper logic for matchup order/selection, on-load initialization, intro setup, match start, and match exit handling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmclassic.c added implementations and local typedefs
changed_files.jsonl: gmclassic.c +634/-8
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source-owned path fact for future gmclassic searches; curator should verify against current source before accepting.

source_update_candidates.title: types.h contains shared game-mode callback and gm_803DDEC8Struct typing used by Classic Mode
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2426 changed UnkAdventureData and UnkAllstarData callback slots to concrete function pointers and reshaped gm_803DDEC8Struct to include scalar fields and a gmClassicMatchup pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h hunks around UnkAdventureData, UnkAllstarData, and gm_803DDEC8Struct
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for future type-recovery tasks; curator should check current source and naming stability.

source_update_candidates.title: Keep PAD_STACK claims narrow unless tactic necessity is isolated
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2426 includes PAD_STACK in two functions that the bot reported as 100% matched, but the slice does not isolate PAD_STACK as the cause of the match. If generalized, record PAD_STACK as a narrowly evidenced tactic, not a style preference.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) in gmClassic_801B3A34 and PAD_STACK(4) in gmClassic_801B3B40
text_corpus: bot report marks both functions 100%
source_update_candidates.reason: This reinforces the loaded matching-tactics standard; curator may decide whether to add this PR as historical supporting evidence rather than a new rule.

rejection_notes: Do not treat the exact goto-heavy shape in gmClassic_801B2BA4 as an accepted control-flow lesson; the bot report only shows 93.87% for that function.
Do not infer semantic field names for offset-style fields such as x0CC, x1B8, x26C, x2B0, x5C, x60, x6C, or x70 from this slice alone.

Do not claim all added gmclassic functions fully matched; only gmClassic_801B3A34 and gmClassic_801B3B40 are reported as 100%, while gmClassic_801B3500, gmClassic_OnLoad, gmClassic_801B2D54, and gmClassic_801B2BA4 are reported as improvements with less than 100%.
No human review feedback is available, so do not attribute acceptance rationale or requested changes to reviewers.
